hero.title: We care for you, we care for everyone
hero.description: Aliaga Salud combines medical expertise, laparoscopic surgery, and human-centered care to address your health needs safely and on time.

highlights.point1: More than 30 years of local medical experience.
highlights.point2: Care for children, adults, and seniors.
highlights.point3: Diagnosis, treatment, and follow-up in one place.

servicesBlock.title: Specialties for your wellbeing
servicesBlock.description: Comprehensive medical coverage with specialists in diagnosis, treatment, and prevention.

staffBlock.title: Medical Team
staffBlock.description: A team committed to close, ethical, and evidence-based care.

testimonialsBlock.title: Trusted by our patients
testimonialsBlock.description: Real stories of care and recovery at Aliaga Salud.

specialties.title: Medical specialties
specialties.description: We provide key specialties for preventive visits, surgical cases, and follow-up care.

carePath.title: Clinical care path
carePath.description: Our process prioritizes clear timing, accurate diagnosis, and continuous support.

step1.title: Triage and first evaluation
step1.description: We review symptoms, history, and clinical signs to route your case from the first touchpoint.

step2.title: Diagnosis and plan
step2.description: We define tests, treatment, and responsible specialist based on medical priority.

step3.title: Treatment or procedure
step3.description: We perform outpatient treatment or surgery following strict clinical safety protocols.

step4.title: Follow-up and control
step4.description: Post-care controls ensure favorable progress and prevent relapse.

staff.title: Aliaga Salud medical team
staff.description: Professionals experienced in general medicine, surgery, and complementary specialties for complete care.

contact.title: Contact and appointments
contact.description: Book your consultation by WhatsApp or leave your details and we will contact you shortly.

faq1.question: Do you handle emergencies?
faq1.answer: We provide initial urgent guidance and stabilization; complex cases are promptly referred if needed.

faq2.question: How do I book my first consultation?
faq2.answer: You can message us on WhatsApp or submit this page form. Our team confirms schedule and specialty.

faq3.question: What documents should I bring?
faq3.answer: Bring ID, previous prescriptions or tests, and your current medication list for a faster assessment.

faq4.question: Do you treat children and seniors?
faq4.answer: Yes. We provide pediatrics and senior-focused care with differentiated protocols.

contactBlock.title: Schedule your appointment
contactBlock.description: Leave your details and we will help you book care according to your needs.

feedback.success: Message sent successfully. We will contact you soon.
feedback.error: Message could not be sent. Please try again.

notFound.title: 404 - Page not found
notFound.description: The requested route does not exist in this site.

footer.title: Aliaga Salud
footer.description: Comprehensive medical center focused on prevention, diagnosis, and treatment with human and professional care.

generalMedicine.title: General medicine
generalMedicine.description: Comprehensive evaluation for common symptoms, chronic control, and preventive checkups.

generalSurgery.title: General surgery
generalSurgery.description: Safe surgical treatment for hernias, gallbladder, and minor or major procedures.

traumatology.title: Traumatology
traumatology.description: Diagnosis and management of muscular, joint, and bone injuries with functional focus.

pediatrics.title: Pediatrics
pediatrics.description: Growth monitoring, common pediatric disease care, and child development follow-up.

gynecology.title: Gynecology
gynecology.description: Preventive and specialized female health care across every life stage.

neurology.title: Neurology
neurology.description: Assessment of headaches, dizziness, neuropathies, and neurological disorders with personalized approach.

gastroenterology.title: Gastroenterology
gastroenterology.description: Management of gastritis, irritable bowel, and digestive conditions with clinical follow-up.

psychology.title: Psychology
psychology.description: Emotional and therapeutic support for anxiety, stress, and mental wellbeing.

stalinAliaga.name: Dr. Stalin Aliaga
stalinAliaga.bio: Over 30 years of experience in general and laparoscopic surgery with focus on safety and rapid recovery.

raulAliaga.name: Dr. Raúl Aliaga
raulAliaga.bio: Clinical care focused on surgical procedures and continuous patient follow-up.

jaimeBecerra.name: Dr. Jaime Becerra
jaimeBecerra.bio: Specialist in digestive disease diagnosis and treatment, with focus on prevention and personalized follow-up.

karlaMendoza.name: Dr. Karla Mendoza
karlaMendoza.bio: Specialist in pediatric checkups, prevention, and treatment of frequent childhood conditions.

joseParedes.name: Dr. José Paredes
joseParedes.bio: Focused on musculoskeletal pain, sports injuries, and functional recovery plans.

gloriaR.name: Gloria R.
gloriaR.text: They treated me with patience and clarity. My issue was solved in just a few visits.

diegoT.name: Diego T.
diegoT.text: The surgical process was organized and clearly explained step by step. Great experience.

andreaM.name: Andrea M.
andreaM.text: They always reply quickly on WhatsApp, and the medical team is warm and professional.
